states.name: Zeshua
states.title: Vengeful Wanderer
states.description: The big thing about this fellow is his sharp tongue. At least he doesn't discriminate. Sziviik, kud, humans, even elves — he hates everyone equally. Every time he opens his mouth, it's insult after insult after insult. But...from what I hear, he wasn't always like this. Some things can change a man.

states.name: Zeshua
states.title: Vengeful Wanderer
states.description: Okay, one more thing.  His sense of direction's as twisted as his personality. He's never gotten where he's going without a guide, not once. I bet he could get lost in an empty room. He doesn't stand a chance of finding who he's looking for without my help. I sure know how to pick 'em, huh?
